texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Group vision Benefit summary for all members
texts.text: Group vision Benefit summary for all members

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Effective date: 01/01/2026
texts.text: Effective date: 01/01/2026

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: What's available to me?
texts.text: What's available to me?

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Vision insurance is offered through Principal fi and VSP fi Vision Care. It provides choice, flexibility and savings through a VSP doctor.
texts.text: Vision insurance is offered through Principal fi and VSP fi Vision Care. It provides choice, flexibility and savings through a VSP doctor.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: If you buy this coverage, an established network of VSP doctors will provide quality care for you and your dependents.
texts.text: If you buy this coverage, an established network of VSP doctors will provide quality care for you and your dependents.

texts.label: footnote
texts.orig: 1 This can vary based on state laws and provider location Savings may not apply at participating retail chains.
texts.text: 1 This can vary based on state laws and provider location Savings may not apply at participating retail chains.

texts.label: page_footer
texts.orig: Insurance issued by Principal Life Insurance Company, 711 High Street, Des Moines, IA 50392
texts.text: Insurance issued by Principal Life Insurance Company, 711 High Street, Des Moines, IA 50392

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Who can buy coverage?
texts.text: Who can buy coverage?

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · You may buy coverage if you re an active, full-time employee. Seasonal, temporary, or contract employees can t purchase.
texts.text: You may buy coverage if you re an active, full-time employee. Seasonal, temporary, or contract employees can t purchase.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: o If you re on regularly scheduled day off, holiday, vacation day, jury duty, funeral leave, or personal time off, you re still considered actively at work, as long as you re fulfilling your regular duties and were working the day immediately prior to your time off.
texts.text: o If you re on regularly scheduled day off, holiday, vacation day, jury duty, funeral leave, or personal time off, you re still considered actively at work, as long as you re fulfilling your regular duties and were working the day immediately prior to your time off.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: o You must enroll within 31 days of being eligible. If you don t, you ll have to wait until the next open enrollment period.
texts.text: o You must enroll within 31 days of being eligible. If you don t, you ll have to wait until the next open enrollment period.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · If you re covered, you may buy coverage for your dependents.
texts.text: If you re covered, you may buy coverage for your dependents.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Additional eligibility requirements may apply.
texts.text: Additional eligibility requirements may apply.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: What's the difference between elective and necessary contacts?
texts.text: What's the difference between elective and necessary contacts?

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Elective - when vision can be corrected by glasses, but contacts are worn.
texts.text: Elective - when vision can be corrected by glasses, but contacts are worn.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Necessary - when vision can't be corrected with glasses due to extreme vision problems.
texts.text: Necessary - when vision can't be corrected with glasses due to extreme vision problems.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Why am I charged an additional copay for contact fitting and evaluation?
texts.text: Why am I charged an additional copay for contact fitting and evaluation?

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Contact lens wearers require an additional evaluation of the eyes  measurements, and possible follow-up appointments, for fitting and training on proper use of contact lenses.
texts.text: Contact lens wearers require an additional evaluation of the eyes  measurements, and possible follow-up appointments, for fitting and training on proper use of contact lenses.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · For these additional services, you won t pay more than $60 at in-network providers.
texts.text: For these additional services, you won t pay more than $60 at in-network providers.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Are benefits the same for all VSP doctors?
texts.text: Are benefits the same for all VSP doctors?

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Yes, with the exception of Costco fi , Walmart fi , and Sam s Club fi . The frame allowance at these locations is $80 which is equivalent to a $150 allowance at other VSP doctor locations. Not all providers at participating retail chains are in-network for exam services.
texts.text: Yes, with the exception of Costco fi , Walmart fi , and Sam s Club fi . The frame allowance at these locations is $80 which is equivalent to a $150 allowance at other VSP doctor locations. Not all providers at participating retail chains are in-network for exam services.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Benefits may also vary by location due to state law.
texts.text: Benefits may also vary by location due to state law.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: How do I find a VSP doctor?
texts.text: How do I find a VSP doctor?

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Visit vsp.com to locate VSP doctors close to you -- or to see if your current eye care professional is in the VSP network.
texts.text: Visit vsp.com to locate VSP doctors close to you -- or to see if your current eye care professional is in the VSP network.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: o You ll need to choose the  Choice  doctor network to view the VSP doctors for your coverage.
texts.text: o You ll need to choose the  Choice  doctor network to view the VSP doctors for your coverage.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Will I get an ID card?
texts.text: Will I get an ID card?

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Yes, your card will have a unique member ID that your doctor will use to verify benefits.
texts.text: Yes, your card will have a unique member ID that your doctor will use to verify benefits.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Will my doctor submit my claim?
texts.text: Will my doctor submit my claim?

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · If you re seeing a VSP doctor, they ll submit the claim for you.
texts.text: If you re seeing a VSP doctor, they ll submit the claim for you.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · If you re seeing someone outside the VSP network, you re responsible for submitting your own claim. You can get that form from vsp.com after logging in as a member using your member ID. Or call 800-877-7195.
texts.text: If you re seeing someone outside the VSP network, you re responsible for submitting your own claim. You can get that form from vsp.com after logging in as a member using your member ID. Or call 800-877-7195.

texts.label: page_footer
texts.orig: Insurance issued by Principal Life Insurance Company, 711 High Street, Des Moines, IA 50392
texts.text: Insurance issued by Principal Life Insurance Company, 711 High Street, Des Moines, IA 50392

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Are there any additional savings with VSP?
texts.text: Are there any additional savings with VSP?

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Glasses and sunglasses - you can save an average of 20-25% off glasses or sunglasses from any VSP doctor within 12 months of your last covered vision exam.
texts.text: Glasses and sunglasses - you can save an average of 20-25% off glasses or sunglasses from any VSP doctor within 12 months of your last covered vision exam.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Laser vision correction - you pay an average of 15% off the regular price and 5% off the promotional price. You ll only receive these discounts from contracted clinics. Go to VSP.com and register using your member ID to see the laser vision promotions and find a contracted clinic.
texts.text: Laser vision correction - you pay an average of 15% off the regular price and 5% off the promotional price. You ll only receive these discounts from contracted clinics. Go to VSP.com and register using your member ID to see the laser vision promotions and find a contracted clinic.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: These savings can vary based on state laws and provider location.
texts.text: These savings can vary based on state laws and provider location.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: What benefits do I receive if my doctor is outside VSP's network?
texts.text: What benefits do I receive if my doctor is outside VSP's network?

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: What are the limitations of my benefits?
texts.text: What are the limitations of my benefits?

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Visual analysis or vision aids that aren't medically necessary aren't covered.
texts.text: Visual analysis or vision aids that aren't medically necessary aren't covered.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · No benefits will be paid for:
texts.text: No benefits will be paid for:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: o Non-prescription glasses
texts.text: o Non-prescription glasses

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: o Medical or surgical treatment of the eyes
texts.text: o Medical or surgical treatment of the eyes

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: o Claims submitted by a doctor who is part of your family
texts.text: o Claims submitted by a doctor who is part of your family

texts.label: text
texts.orig: This benefit summary is a summary only. For a complete list of benefit information and limitations, please refer to your booklet.
texts.text: This benefit summary is a summary only. For a complete list of benefit information and limitations, please refer to your booklet.
